victorychart.categories: {x: ['Ethan Brooks','Sofia Ramirez','Michelina Della Donna','Priya Patel','Alex Chen']}

victoryaxis.tickformat: ['Ethan Brooks','Sofia Ramirez','Michelina Della Donna','Priya Patel','Alex Chen']
victoryaxis.style: {axis: {stroke: 'transparent'}, ticks: {stroke: 'transparent'}, grid: {stroke: 'transparent'}, tickLabels: {fill: '#73857E', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 500, fontFamily: 'Expensify Neue', padding: 24}}

{axis: {stroke: 'transparent'}, ticks: {stroke: 'transparent'}, grid: {stroke: '#E6E1DA', strokeWidth: 1}, tickLabels: {fill: '#73857E', fontSize: 11, fontWeight: 500, fontFamily: 'Expensify Neue', padding: 8}}

victorybar.data: [{x: 'Ethan Brooks', y: 9450},{x: 'Sofia Ramirez', y: 10500},{x: 'Michelina Della Donna', y: 11900},{x: 'Priya Patel', y: 13400},{x: 'Alex Chen', y: 14300}]
[{x: 'Ethan Brooks', y: 8800},{x: 'Sofia Ramirez', y: 10250},{x: 'Michelina Della Donna', y: 11250},{x: 'Priya Patel', y: 13900},{x: 'Alex Chen', y: 12500}]

victorylegend.data: [{name: 'This month', symbol: {fill: '#13C96B', size: 6}},{name: 'Last month', symbol: {fill: '#1E90F2', size: 6}}]
